text:
Condition “Developmental Disabilities”; most recent in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: HCBS_DEVDIS_CC_IND 

LONG NAME: HCBS_DEVDIS_CC_IND 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 3 

FILE(S): Disability and need 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: This flag is state reported; it is eligibility-based and not claims-based. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
